vampire_major_001.title: Public Revelation
vampire_major_001.body: Some members of the clan want to show themselves openly to humans to impose fear once and for all. Do you allow it?
vampire_major_001.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_001.outcome_yes_body: The secret is shattered. Game over.
vampire_major_001.outcome_no_body: You keep the shadows as your ally. Discretion returns to 50.

vampire_major_002.title: Blood Shortage
vampire_major_002.body: The reserves are dropping, and some want to take too many risks to refill the stock tonight. Do you stop this desperate hunt?
vampire_major_002.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_002.outcome_yes_body: You impose calm and blood returns to a stable level.
vampire_major_002.outcome_no_body: The hunt goes badly. Your blood reserves are cut in half.

vampire_major_003.title: False Refuge
vampire_major_003.body: Hunters may have located an old refuge. Do you make them believe it is still occupied to lure them there?
vampire_major_003.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_003.outcome_yes_body: You divert the threat. Hunter pressure returns to 50.
vampire_major_003.outcome_no_body: They move forward without resistance. The hunters gain even more ground.

vampire_major_004.title: Punish a Clan Leader
vampire_major_004.body: An elder of the clan has been breaking the rules for months. Do you bring him down in front of everyone?
vampire_major_004.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_004.outcome_yes_body: You remind everyone that no one is above the clan. The clan returns to 50.
vampire_major_004.outcome_no_body: Weakness shows. The clan loses half its cohesion.

vampire_major_005.title: Erase the Traces
vampire_major_005.body: A series of mistakes has left too many clues around the city. Do you clean everything up tonight, even if it means suspending several activities?
vampire_major_005.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_005.outcome_yes_body: You close the trails in time. Discretion returns to 50.
vampire_major_005.outcome_no_body: The clues keep piling up. Discretion drops by half.

vampire_major_006.title: Banquet Too Visible
vampire_major_006.body: A private party could quickly refill the blood reserves, but the risk is enormous. Do you keep it on?
vampire_major_006.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_006.outcome_yes_body: The banquet goes badly. Blood drops by half.
vampire_major_006.outcome_no_body: You avoid the scandal and the reserves return to 50.

vampire_major_007.title: Lure the Hunters into a Trap
vampire_major_007.body: Your best fighter wants to set a huge trap for the hunters. If he fails, the lair is compromised. Do you authorize it?
vampire_major_007.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_007.outcome_yes_body: The trap fails and the lair is compromised. Game over.
vampire_major_007.outcome_no_body: You refuse this move because it is too risky, and the hunters return to 50.

vampire_major_008.title: Exile a Bloodline
vampire_major_008.body: One branch of the clan refuses every rule. Do you exile it completely?
vampire_major_008.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_008.outcome_yes_body: You cause a brutal split. The clan loses half its strength.
vampire_major_008.outcome_no_body: You negotiate without breaking the whole balance. The clan returns to 50.

vampire_major_009.title: Change Lair
vampire_major_009.body: Too many rumors are spreading about your current lair. Do you order an immediate discreet relocation?
vampire_major_009.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_009.outcome_yes_body: You become hard to track again. Discretion returns to 50.
vampire_major_009.outcome_no_body: The hunters tighten the net. Their threat grows stronger.

vampire_major_010.title: Cameras Everywhere
vampire_major_010.body: The city is filling with cameras and phones. Do you keep going almost as before despite the risk?
vampire_major_010.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_010.outcome_yes_body: You react too late. Discretion has already lost half its value.
vampire_major_010.outcome_no_body: You finally impose strict rules. Discretion returns to 50.

vampire_major_011.title: Safe Source at the Hospital
vampire_major_011.body: A human contact offers discreet access to blood reserves. Do you centralize the entire supply around him?
vampire_major_011.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_011.outcome_yes_body: You secure the access and blood returns to 50.
vampire_major_011.outcome_no_body: You let everyone improvise. Discretion drops by half.

vampire_major_012.title: Let the Hunters Get Closer
vampire_major_012.body: You could let them advance a little farther to observe them better, or cut off their tracks immediately. Do you keep waiting?
vampire_major_012.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_012.outcome_yes_body: You give them too much time. The hunters gain even more ground.
vampire_major_012.outcome_no_body: You break their momentum in time. The hunters return to 50.

vampire_major_013.title: Clan Code
vampire_major_013.body: The clan's rules have become unclear and everyone interprets them their own way. Do you impose a new clear code?
vampire_major_013.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_013.outcome_yes_body: You restore a shared direction. The clan returns to 50.
vampire_major_013.outcome_no_body: Internal disorder grows. The clan drops by half.

vampire_major_014.title: Curious Journalist
vampire_major_014.body: A journalist is starting to connect several disappearances. Do you make all the evidence disappear now?
vampire_major_014.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_014.outcome_yes_body: You close the trail before it becomes dangerous. Discretion returns to 50.
vampire_major_014.outcome_no_body: He digs too far. Discretion is cut in half.

vampire_major_015.title: Emergency Reserve
vampire_major_015.body: You can sacrifice part of the clan's comfort to rebuild a blood reserve, or keep going like this. Do you sacrifice the comfort?
vampire_major_015.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_015.outcome_yes_body: You secure what matters most. Blood returns to 50.
vampire_major_015.outcome_no_body: The reserves remain fragile. Blood is cut in half.

vampire_major_016.title: Massacre as an Example
vampire_major_016.body: An elder wants to strike hard to terrorize the whole city and silence suspicion. Do you give him free rein?
vampire_major_016.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_016.outcome_yes_body: The whole city turns against you. Game over.
vampire_major_016.outcome_no_body: You avoid the worst and discretion returns to 50.

vampire_major_017.title: Anti-Hunter Front
vampire_major_017.body: You can focus all resources on fighting the hunters for a few nights. Do you do it?
vampire_major_017.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_017.outcome_yes_body: The pressure finally eases. The hunters return to 50.
vampire_major_017.outcome_no_body: They gain even more ground. You react too late to truly slow them down.

vampire_major_018.title: Elder Against Elder
vampire_major_018.body: Two elders are threatening to tear the clan apart. Do you force them to submit publicly?
vampire_major_018.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_018.outcome_yes_body: You humiliate them too harshly and everything explodes. The clan drops by half.
vampire_major_018.outcome_no_body: You mend what can still be saved. The clan returns to 50.

vampire_major_019.title: Phones Seized
vampire_major_019.body: You can recover all the phones taken during the last hunts before they reveal too much. Do you order it?
vampire_major_019.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_019.outcome_yes_body: You erase valuable traces. Discretion returns to 50.
vampire_major_019.outcome_no_body: The clues keep piling up. Discretion is cut in half.

vampire_major_020.title: Reduce Outings
vampire_major_020.body: To preserve blood, you can severely limit the clan's outings. Do you impose that discipline?
vampire_major_020.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_020.outcome_yes_body: You avoid excess and blood returns to 50.
vampire_major_020.outcome_no_body: Everyone keeps taking from it recklessly. Blood drops by half.

vampire_major_021.title: Hunting Patrol
vampire_major_021.body: You can send a small team to track the hunters before they strike. Do you take that risk?
vampire_major_021.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_021.outcome_yes_body: The team falls into a trap. The hunters gain even more ground.
vampire_major_021.outcome_no_body: You choose smart defense. The hunters return to 50.

vampire_major_022.title: Night Council
vampire_major_022.body: The clan speaks only through threats now. Do you gather everyone and impose a shared line?
vampire_major_022.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_022.outcome_yes_body: You restore a common foundation. The clan returns to 50.
vampire_major_022.outcome_no_body: Silence turns into rupture. The clan drops by half.

vampire_major_023.title: A Single Source
vampire_major_023.body: One advisor wants to depend on a single major blood source to simplify logistics. Do you refuse that dependency?
vampire_major_023.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_023.outcome_yes_body: You refuse total dependency and discretion returns to 50.
vampire_major_023.outcome_no_body: You weaken the whole chain. Blood drops by half.

vampire_major_024.title: Temporary Retreat
vampire_major_024.body: You can close several access points to the lair for a few nights to become invisible again. Do you accept this retreat?
vampire_major_024.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_024.outcome_yes_body: You accept this retreat and discretion returns to 50.
vampire_major_024.outcome_no_body: You stay too exposed and discretion drops by half.

vampire_major_025.title: Share the Reserves
vampire_major_025.body: Some bloodlines are hoarding blood while others are running out. Do you impose a redistribution?
vampire_major_025.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_025.outcome_yes_body: You prevent local shortages. Blood returns to 50.
vampire_major_025.outcome_no_body: Hunger causes mistakes everywhere. Blood is cut in half.

vampire_major_026.title: Cut the Hunters' Networks
vampire_major_026.body: You can disrupt several of their contact points at once, or keep reacting instead. Do you strike their network?
vampire_major_026.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_026.outcome_yes_body: Their coordination falls apart. The hunters return to 50.
vampire_major_026.outcome_no_body: You keep taking the hits. The hunters gain even more ground.

vampire_major_027.title: Make an Example
vampire_major_027.body: To bring the clan back together, an elder proposes a public execution of a rival. Do you let him do it?
vampire_major_027.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_027.outcome_yes_body: The clan falls into internal war. Game over.
vampire_major_027.outcome_no_body: You refuse easy barbarity. The clan returns to 50.

vampire_major_028.title: Night Photos
vampire_major_028.body: Blurry pictures of vampires are already circulating online. Do you launch a large operation to erase everything?
vampire_major_028.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_028.outcome_yes_body: You launch an operation that is too visible and discretion drops by half.
vampire_major_028.outcome_no_body: You refuse that agitation and handle it more quietly. Discretion returns to 50.

vampire_major_029.title: Controlled Stocks
vampire_major_029.body: You can centralize all blood reserves to prevent abuse. Do you make that decision?
vampire_major_029.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_029.outcome_yes_body: You secure the resource. Blood returns to 50.
vampire_major_029.outcome_no_body: The losses continue. Blood is cut in half.

vampire_major_030.title: Leave Them a Trail
vampire_major_030.body: You can leave a very convincing false trail for the hunters, but if they see through the trap they will trace it back to you. Do you try it?
vampire_major_030.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_030.outcome_yes_body: The decoy does not hold. The hunters gain too much ground.
vampire_major_030.outcome_no_body: You avoid the useless gamble. The hunters return to 50.

vampire_major_031.title: Shared Rules
vampire_major_031.body: Each bloodline protects its own habits and refuses to give in. Do you impose a shared rule even if it causes friction?
vampire_major_031.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_031.outcome_yes_body: You regain a backbone. The clan returns to 50.
vampire_major_031.outcome_no_body: Every vampire for themselves wins out. The clan drops by half.

vampire_major_032.title: Change the Habits
vampire_major_032.body: The clan keeps making the same quiet mistakes. Do you impose a brutal change in methods?
vampire_major_032.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_032.outcome_yes_body: You take back control. Discretion returns to 50.
vampire_major_032.outcome_no_body: The old mistakes continue. Discretion is cut in half.

vampire_major_033.title: Forced Fasting
vampire_major_033.body: To avoid panic, you can impose very strict blood rationing for a few nights. Do you do it?
vampire_major_033.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_033.outcome_yes_body: You ration in time and blood returns to 50.
vampire_major_033.outcome_no_body: You let the situation slide and blood loses half its value.

vampire_major_034.title: Hide the Lair
vampire_major_034.body: You can seal off several known access points to make things harder for the hunters, at the cost of a major effort from the clan. Do you order it?
vampire_major_034.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_034.outcome_yes_body: You reduce their advance. The hunters return to 50.
vampire_major_034.outcome_no_body: They keep entry points that are too valuable. The hunters grow even stronger.

vampire_major_035.title: Uncontrollable Elders
vampire_major_035.body: The oldest vampires are blocking everything and thinking only about their prestige. Do you push them into the background?
vampire_major_035.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_035.outcome_yes_body: You give the clan direction again. The clan returns to 50.
vampire_major_035.outcome_no_body: The ego conflicts continue. Discretion pays the price.

vampire_major_036.title: Media All-Nighter
vampire_major_036.body: You can try to erase a whole wave of rumors in a single night, but the operation itself is risky. Do you launch it?
vampire_major_036.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_036.outcome_yes_body: You become too visible while erasing the traces. Discretion drops by half.
vampire_major_036.outcome_no_body: You choose patience and precision. Discretion returns to 50.

vampire_major_037.title: Infiltrated Clinic
vampire_major_037.body: A human ally can help the clan with blood in the long term, but the supply line will need better protection. Do you secure it right away?
vampire_major_037.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_037.outcome_yes_body: You finally make the supply stable. Blood returns to 50.
vampire_major_037.outcome_no_body: The supply line remains fragile. Blood drops by half.

vampire_major_038.title: Hunters Too Close
vampire_major_038.body: They almost know the clan's schedule. Do you change every routine starting tonight?
vampire_major_038.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_038.outcome_yes_body: You change the routines before you are exposed. The hunters return to 50.
vampire_major_038.outcome_no_body: You let your schedule become readable. The hunters keep half their lead.

vampire_major_039.title: Clan Oath
vampire_major_039.body: You can impose a new shared oath to calm tensions, or let each bloodline manage on its own. Do you impose the oath?
vampire_major_039.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_039.outcome_yes_body: You recreate a minimum of unity. The clan returns to 50.
vampire_major_039.outcome_no_body: The divisions take root. The clan loses half its strength.

vampire_major_040.title: Mass Outing
vampire_major_040.body: Some young vampires want to go out together in the middle of the city to celebrate a victory. Everything tells you this is a disaster. Do you let them do it?
vampire_major_040.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
vampire_major_040.outcome_yes_body: They reveal the clan's existence to the whole world. Game over.
vampire_major_040.outcome_no_body: You stop this collective suicide. Discretion returns to 50.
